{{Quote|I kidded him about being Jabba the Hutt's younger, cuter brother.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Children of the Jedi (novel)">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref>}}
'''Drub McKumb''' was a blue-eyed [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] whom [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] each knew from their smuggling days. Drub was a plump [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].

==Biography==
McKumb had last seen Han prior to the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], when he warned Han on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] about the price [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] had on his head.

Years later, in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], when Han went to [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]] to see the [[Herd Meet/Legends|Time of Meeting]] with [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], a crazed Drub attempted to warn Han of the looming threat of ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. He used [[yarrock]] gained from [[Fargednim P'taan]] to temporarily suppress his madness.

{{Char-stub}}
